title: Brazil: Petrobras Advances in Contracting to Build the First BioQAV and Renewable Diesel Plant
content: Petrobras has initiated the contracting process to build the first plant dedicated to the production of BioQAV (or SBC, an acronym for Synthetic Blend Component for SAF production ) and renewable diesel (or HVO - Hydrotreated Vegetable Oil ), to be installed at the Presidente Bernardes Refinery (RPBC) in CubatÃ£o, SÃ£o Paulo. The project is expected to process approximately 950,000 tons per year of plant-based feedstocks and animal fat, generating a production capacity of up to 16,000 bpd of renewable fuels (BioQAV and renewable diesel).
author: Analysts Account
